sources.title: If Clowns Scare You Don't Watch This! | Kruel | Full Movie | Evil Clown Survival Thriller
sources.description:
'Kruel' - is a horror/thriller feature length movie about a psychotic killer who masquerades as an ice cream man in order to get closer to the objects of his affection.
2015.  Stars: Kierney Nelson, Dakota Morrissiey, Adam Vernier
